# Sigil UI

> One markdown file controls your entire design system.

## What It Is

Sigil UI is a token-driven React design system. One DESIGN.md file defines every color, font, radius, shadow, and animation across 350+ components. Edit the markdown — CSS, Tailwind v4, and W3C JSON recompile automatically.

## Key Stats

- 519 design tokens across 33 categories
- 46 curated presets (each populates all 519 tokens)
- 350+ token-driven React components
- 40+ headless behavior primitives (Radix + Base UI)
- OKLCH color space, light/dark themed
- Compiles to CSS custom properties + Tailwind v4 + W3C JSON

## How It Works

DESIGN.md contains all tokens in markdown tables. Run `sigil design compile` to generate:
- CSS custom properties (:root { --s-primary: oklch(...); ... })
- Tailwind v4 @theme block
- W3C Design Tokens JSON

Components read from var(--s-*). Change the token file, components update.

## Token Categories (33)

colors, typography, spacing, layout, sigil, radius, shadows, motion, borders, buttons, cards, headings, navigation, backgrounds, code, inputs, cursor, scrollbar, alignment, sections, dividers, gridVisuals, focus, overlays, dataViz, media, controls, componentSurfaces, hero, cta, footer, banner, pageRhythm

## Presets (46)

Structural: sigil, kova, cobalt, helix, hex
Minimal: crux, axiom, arc, mono
Dark: basalt, onyx, fang, obsid, cipher, noir
Colorful: flux, shard, prism, vex, dsgn, dusk
Editorial: etch, rune, strata, glyph, mrkr
Industrial: alloy, forge, anvil, rivet, brass
Edgeless: vast, aura, field, clay, sage, ink, sand, plum, moss, coral, dune, ocean, rose

## CLI Commands

sigil init — project setup
sigil design generate — create DESIGN.md from preset
sigil design compile — parse DESIGN.md → CSS + Tailwind + JSON
sigil design sync — update compile sections in-place
sigil design extract <url> — extract DESIGN.md from URL
sigil preset <name> — switch preset
sigil add <name> — add components
sigil inspire <url> — draft tokens from reference
sigil docs — generate docs + llms.txt
sigil doctor — validate project health

## Packages

@sigil-ui/tokens — 519 tokens, compiler (CSS, Tailwind, W3C JSON, TypeScript)
@sigil-ui/presets — 46 curated presets
@sigil-ui/components — 350+ token-driven React components
@sigil-ui/primitives — 40+ headless primitives (Radix + Base UI)
@sigil-ui/cli — project workflow CLI
create-sigil-app — one-command scaffolding

## The Core Principle

Edit tokens, not components. One file at the top of the chain controls everything downstream. Presets are complete visual identities (500+ resolved tokens), not color schemes.

## For Agents

- Read DESIGN.md to understand the current visual identity
- Edit token tables in DESIGN.md to change appearance
- Run `sigil design compile` after edits
- Never edit component files for visual changes
- Use OKLCH for all color values
- Reference skills/sigil-design/SKILL.md for the format spec
- Reference skills/sigil-messaging/SKILL.md for copy/positioning

## Links

Website: https://sigil-ui.com
Docs: https://sigil-ui.com/docs
Presets: https://sigil-ui.com/presets
